Interface Member

All Superinterfaces:
AccessFlags, ModelElement, NamedModelElement, ProgramModelElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
AnnotationProperty, ClassType, Constructor, EnumConstant, Field, Method, TypeParameter
All Known Implementing Classes:
AnnotationDeclaration, AnnotationPropertyDeclaration, AnnotationPropertyInfo, ClassDeclaration, ClassFile, ConstructorDeclaration, ConstructorInfo, DefaultConstructor, EnumClassDeclaration, EnumConstantSpecification, EnumDeclaration, FieldInfo, FieldSpecification, ImplicitEnumMethod, ImplicitEnumValueOf, ImplicitEnumValues, InterfaceDeclaration, IntersectionType, MemberInfo, MethodDeclaration, MethodInfo, NullType, ParameterizedType, TypeDeclaration, TypeParameterDeclaration, TypeParameterInfo
public interface Member extends ProgramModelElement
A program model element representing members.

  • Method Details

    • isFinal

      boolean isFinal()
      Checks if this member is final.
      Returns:
      true if this member is final, false otherwise.

    • isStatic

      boolean isStatic()
      Checks if this member is static. Returns true for Constructors.
      Returns:
      true if this member is static, false otherwise.

    • isPrivate

      boolean isPrivate()
      Checks if this member is private.
      Returns:
      true if this member is private, false otherwise.

    • isProtected

      boolean isProtected()
      Checks if this member is protected.
      Returns:
      true if this member is protected, false otherwise.

    • isPublic

      boolean isPublic()
      Checks if this member is public.
      Returns:
      true if this member is public, false otherwise.

    • isStrictFp

      boolean isStrictFp()
      Checks if this member is strictfp.
      Returns:
      true if this member is strictfp, false otherwise.

    • getContainingClassType

      ClassType getContainingClassType()
      Returns the logical parent class of this member.
      Returns:
      the class type containing this member.

    • getAnnotations

      List<? extends AnnotationUse> getAnnotations()
      Returns a list of Annotations.
      Returns:
      the annotations
